ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the asset during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price considering splits and dividends */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the asset */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed */,
  "week_day" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1 = Monday, 7 = Sunday) */,
  "change" REAL /* Price change compared to the previous day */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative Strength Index value */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends paid on the asset */,
  "splits" REAL /* Stock splits information */,
  "volume_weighted_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate for multi-currency assets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol representing the asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Full name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the asset is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the asset */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the asset is based */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List number */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the asset information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the firm */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the access request */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset associated with the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of trading session */,
  "session_volume" INTEGER /* Volume traded during the session */,
  "session_high" REAL /* Highest price during the session */,
  "session_low" REAL /* Lowest price during the session */,
  "session_open" REAL /* Opening price of the session */,
  "session_close" REAL /* Closing price of the session */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Change in volume compared to the previous session */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price compared to the previous session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original news article */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the news article to the market */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the news article */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Impact score of the news article on the market */,
  "related_assets" TEXT /* List of assets related to the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)
